id.description: Refund ID for the returned refund.

order_id.description: Order ID associated with the refund.

user_id.description: Reference to the user ID who created the refund. This is automatically populated by BigCommerce.

created.description: Timestamp of when the refund was created.

total_amount.description: A non-negative 2 decimal place rounded value that represents the amount that can be refunded with the correct payment provider(s).

total_tax.description: Total tax amount refunded back to the shopper. This can be a negative amount indicating we have collected tax by refunding less to the customer.

uses_merchant_override_values.description: Whether refund amount and tax are provided explicitly by merchant override.

provider_id.description:
Reference to payment provider.
example: storecredit

amount.description: A non-negative two decimal place rounded value represents the amount that can be charged/refunded with payment providers.

offline.description: Indicates whether the payment was offline.

is_declined.description: Indicates if this payment has been declined by the payment provider.

declined_message.description: Message indicates why the payment was declined.

item_type.description: Type of item that was refunded.

item_id.description: `order_product.id` corresponding to the item_types of PRODUCT, GIFT_WRAPPING. `order_address.id` corresponding to the item_types of SHIPPING, HANDLING. `order.id` corresponding to the item_type of ORDER.

quantity.description: Quantity of item refunded. Note: this will only be populated for item_type PRODUCT.

requested_amount.description: A non-negative two decimal place rounded value that represents the amount that can be refunded with the payment provider(s).
